events.description: A pack of wolves was spotted near the forest edge, closer to the village than usual.
A merchant caravan arrived from the capital, bringing exotic goods and news from afar.
A small fire broke out in one of the farm barns. The cause is unknown.
Strange, large tracks were found in the mud near the forest path. They don't match any known animal.
A heated argument in the tavern escalated into a brawl between two farmers over a land dispute.
The village is preparing for the annual harvest festival. Spirits are high and decorations are going up.
Several cows at Millfield Farm have fallen ill with a mysterious disease.
A merchant reported goods stolen from their stall overnight. Suspicion falls on several villagers.
A lone knight in battered armor arrived at the village, seeking rest and claiming to be on a quest.
The village well water tastes strange. Some fear it has been poisoned, others blame the recent rains.
An eerie green glow was seen deep in the Whispering Woods at midnight. The hunters are spooked.
The king's tax collector is expected to arrive soon. Villagers are anxious about the new rates.
An accident at the smithy sent sparks flying and nearly set fire to the roof. No one was hurt.
A love letter was found in the market square. The author is unknown, sparking village gossip.
The usual supply of medicinal herbs has dried up. The herbalists are struggling to find alternatives.
A farmer's child went missing near the forest edge. Search parties are being organized.
The river is running low and the well level is dropping. If rain doesn't come soon, the crops will suffer.
A landslide near the forest revealed the entrance to what appears to be ancient ruins.
The village council is split over whether to spend gold on new defenses or on improving the market road.
A blood-red full moon rises tonight. The superstitious villagers bar their doors and mutter prayers.
Reports of bandits on the trade road to the capital. Merchant traffic has slowed to a trickle.
A hooded stranger arrived at the village and took a room at the tavern without saying a word.
